Authentication error - please try again: Tree item label when authentication fails.
User information not available: Tree item error text when user info cannot be loaded.
No spaces found: Tree item label when no spaces exist.
Failed to load spaces: Tree item label when spaces loading fails.
Unable to load items - invalid space ID: Tree item label when space ID is invalid.
Space ID is missing: Tree item error text when space ID is missing.
No items found: Tree item label when a space has no items.
This space is empty: Tree item error text when a space contains no items.
No notebooks or .dlex documents found: Tree item label when no supported documents exist in a space.
This space may contain other document ty: Tree item error text for spaces with unsupported document types.
Failed to load documents: Tree item label when document loading fails.
No description: Fallback text when a snapshot has no description.
Value is hidden for security. Use \"View: Tooltip text explaining why secret value is hidden.
Datalayer can preload common Python pack: Preload prompt shown on first startup, {0} is the comma-separated list of package names.
Download Now: Button label to start downloading Pyodide packages immediately.
Skip: Button label to skip the current action without disabling it.
Disable Preload: Button label to permanently disable Pyodide package preloading.
Pyodide package configuration changed. D: Prompt when Pyodide packages setting changes, {0} is the comma-separated list of package names.
Progress message while preloading Pyodide packages.
Pyodide packages preloaded successfully: Success message after all Pyodide packages are preloaded.
Progress message while loading a single package, {0} is the package name.
Loaded {0}/{1} packages: Progress message after loading packages, {0} is the number loaded, {1} is the total.
Progress message while waiting for OAuth browser callback.
Authentication successful!: Progress message after OAuth authentication succeeds.
Primer Theme Showcase: Panel title for the Primer theme showcase webview.
ag-ui Notebook Example: Panel title for the ag-ui CopilotKit example webview.
Failed to preload Pyodide packages: {0}: Error shown when Pyodide package preloading fails, {0} is the error message.
Unknown Space: Fallback name for a space when the actual name is unavailable.
Invalid YouTube URL or video ID: Validation error when the entered YouTube URL or ID is not recognized.
Insert YouTube Video: Heading for the YouTube video insertion dialog.
YouTube URL or Video ID: Label for the YouTube URL or video ID input field.
Placeholder for the YouTube URL input field.
Supported formats:: Label preceding the list of supported YouTube URL formats.
Please enter link text: Validation error when the link text field is empty.
Insert Link: Heading for the link insertion dialog.
Link Text: Label for the link text input field.
Enter link text: Placeholder for the link text input field.
URL: Label for the URL input field.
Local Notebook: QuickPick label for creating a notebook in the local workspace.
Cloud Notebook: QuickPick label for creating a notebook in a Datalayer cloud space.
Lexical Editor: Aria label for the Lexical rich text editor content area.
Failed to load Lexical Editor: Heading shown when the Lexical editor fails to initialize.
Error: {0}: Error detail shown when the Lexical editor fails to load, {0} is the error message.
Suggestion shown when the Lexical editor fails to load.
Error: Root element not found: Error shown when the Lexical editor root DOM element is missing.
Collaborative • Auto-saved: Status indicator shown when collaborative editing and auto-save are active.
Loading message shown while the notebook editor initializes.
Pyodide Preload: Title of the hidden webview panel used to preload Pyodide packages.
my_secret: Placeholder example for secret name input.
Placeholder example for Jupyter server URL input.
Run Current Cell (Shift+Enter): Tooltip for the run current cell toolbar button.
Run All Cells: Tooltip for the run all cells toolbar button.
Clear All Cell Outputs: Tooltip for the clear all cell outputs toolbar button.
Restart Kernel: Tooltip for the restart kernel toolbar button.
Text color: Tooltip for the text color picker.
Highlight color: Tooltip for the highlight color picker.
Add Code Cell: Tooltip for the add code cell toolbar button.
Add Markdown Cell: Tooltip for the add markdown cell toolbar button.
Run Active Cell: Tooltip for the run active cell toolbar button.
Clear All Outputs: Tooltip for the clear all outputs toolbar button.
More actions: Tooltip for the overflow menu button showing additional actions.
Output truncated at 1MB limit: Message appended to Pyodide output when it exceeds 1MB size limit.
WebSocket error: Fallback error message when WebSocket connection fails during collaboration.
Snapshot: Label for snapshot field in tooltip markdown.
Environment: Label for environment field in tooltip markdown.
Created: Label for creation date field in tooltip markdown.
ID: Label for identifier field in tooltip markdown.
Failed to process OAuth callback: {0}: Error when OAuth callback processing fails, {0} is the error detail.
Invalid OAuth state - potential CSRF att: Error when OAuth state validation fails.
Datalayer: {0}: Kernel selector label for cloud runtimes, {0} is the runtime name.
Markdown: Toolbar button label for adding a Markdown cell.
Run All: Toolbar button label for running all cells.
Run Cell: Toolbar button label for running the active cell.
Clear: Toolbar button label for clearing all outputs.
Normal: Block type dropdown label for normal paragraph text.
Heading 1: Block type dropdown label for heading level 1.
Heading 2: Block type dropdown label for heading level 2.
Heading 3: Block type dropdown label for heading level 3.
Bullet List: Block type dropdown label for unordered list.
Numbered List: Block type dropdown label for ordered list.
Check List: Block type dropdown label for checklist.
Quote: Block type dropdown label for block quote.
Restart: Toolbar button label for restarting the kernel.
Onboarding state reset. Reload the windo: Debug message after resetting onboarding state.
Cannot {0} - not authenticated to Datala: Tool error message when action requires authentication, {0} is the action description.
Not authenticated. Please sign in to acc: Chat message when user is not authenticated for cloud runtimes.
No active runtimes found. Use listKernel: Tool message when no active runtimes are found.
No running runtimes found. Create a new: Chat message when no running runtimes are found.
Found {0} running runtimes: {1}. Please: Tool message when multiple runtimes are found, {0} is the count, {1} is the list of names.
Multiple runtimes running ({0}). Please: Chat message when multiple runtimes are running, {0} is the count.
Python extension is not installed or act: Tool message when Python extension is missing.
Python extension not found. Install it t: Chat message when Python extension is missing.
No active Python environment found. Plea: Tool message when no active Python environment exists.
No active Python environment. Select a P: Chat message when no active Python environment exists.

Chat message when Python environment resolution fails.
Could not determine Python executable pa: Tool message when Python executable path cannot be found.
Failed to resolve Python executable path: Chat message when Python executable path resolution fails.
Connected to local Python environment \": Tool message after connecting to a local Python environment, {0} is the environment name.
Connected to local IPykernel: {0}: Chat message after connecting to a local IPykernel, {0} is the environment name.
Invalid environment type \"{0}\". Must b: Tool message when an invalid environment type is specified, {0} is the type.
Invalid environment type: {0}: Chat message when an invalid environment type is specified, {0} is the type.
No environments available on the Datalay: Tool message when no environments are available on the platform.
Chat message when no environments are available on the platform.
Environment \"{0}\" not found. Available: Tool message when a specific environment is not found, {0} is the name, {1} is the list of available environments.
Chat message when a specific environment is not available, {0} is the name.
Runtime \"{0}\" was created but did not: Tool message when runtime creation times out, {0} is the runtime name.
Runtime creation timed out. Check Datala: Chat message when runtime creation times out.
Created and connected to {0} runtime \"{: Tool message after creating and connecting to a runtime, {0} is the type, {1} is the name, {2} is the duration.
Started new {0} runtime \"{1}\" ({2} min: Chat message after starting a new runtime, {0} is the type, {1} is the name, {2} is the duration.
Runtime \"{0}\" not found. Use listKerne: Tool message when a runtime is not found, {0} is the runtime ID.
Runtime not found: {0}: Chat message when a runtime is not found, {0} is the runtime ID.
Runtime \"{0}\" is not ready. It may sti: Tool message when a runtime is not ready, {0} is the runtime name.
Runtime not ready: {0}: Chat message when a runtime is not ready, {0} is the runtime name.
No notebook or lexical document is curre: Tool message when no active document is found.
No active document. Please open a notebo: Chat message when no active document is found.
Connected to Pyodide (browser-based Pyth: Tool message after connecting to Pyodide kernel.
Connected to Pyodide - browser Python (n: Chat message after connecting to Pyodide kernel.
Could not recognize kernel ID \"{0}\". U: Tool message when a kernel ID is not recognized, {0} is the kernel ID.
Unknown kernel type: {0}: Chat message when a kernel type is unknown, {0} is the kernel ID.
Failed to select kernel: {0}: Tool error message when kernel selection fails, {0} is the error detail.
Could not connect to kernel: {0}: Chat message when kernel connection fails, {0} is the error detail.
Python environment not found at path: {0: Tool message when a Python environment is not found, {0} is the path.
Chat message when a Python environment is not found.
Could not determine Python executable pa: Tool message when Python executable path cannot be resolved, {0} is the environment path.
Pyodide (Browser Python): Display name for the Pyodide browser-based Python kernel.
Browser-based Python kernel powered by W: Description for the Pyodide kernel in the kernel list.
Display name for the create new runtime option in kernel list.
Found {0} kernel(s): Chat message prefix showing total kernel count, {0} is the count.
(Pyodide browser Python): Chat message suffix indicating Pyodide kernel is available.
({0} cloud runtime): Chat message suffix for single cloud runtime, {0} is the count.
({0} cloud runtimes): Chat message suffix for multiple cloud runtimes, {0} is the count.
({0} local environment): Chat message suffix for single local environment, {0} is the count.
({0} local environments): Chat message suffix for multiple local environments, {0} is the count.
option to start new runtime: Chat message suffix indicating option to create a new runtime.
Pyodide core files already cached: Progress message when Pyodide core files are already cached locally.
Downloading {0} ({1}/{2}): Progress message while downloading a file, {0} is the filename, {1} is the current index, {2} is the total count.
Initializing Pyodide for package downloa: Progress message while initializing Pyodide for package preloading.
Progress message while loading the micropip package manager.
Add Comment: Context menu label for adding a comment to selected text.
Expired: Status label when a runtime has expired.
Edit: Undo/redo label for a notebook edit operation.
Runtime: Label in runtime tree item tooltip.
Expires: Label in runtime tooltip for expiration time.
Time Remaining: Label in runtime tooltip for remaining duration.
Credits/hour: Label in runtime tooltip showing credit burn rate.
Network error. Please check your connect: Error shown when network request fails.
Too many requests. Please wait a moment: Warning shown when API rate limit is hit.
Datalayer service is temporarily unavail: Error shown when Datalayer backend is down.
